name: AspiremsAI
tagline: A 24/7 AI mentor for every school student — in Hindi, English, and 10+ regional languages.
description: AI-native learning companion for grades 8-12. Four connected portals, adaptive quizzes, crisis detection, and voice-first access on ₹5,000 phones.
longDescription: Built for grades 8 through 12 across public and private schools. AspiremsAI listens in the student's language, adapts to their learning pace, and connects students, teachers, parents, and administrators in one system. Live at aspirems.ai today.
forWhom: For school principals, teachers, and student wellness teams in grades 8–12.

keyCapabilities.title: Four connected portals
keyCapabilities.description: Student, teacher, parent, and administrator interfaces — each tailored to their role, all sharing the same intelligence layer.

keyCapabilities.title: Psychometric + adaptive
keyCapabilities.description: Science-backed psychometric assessment combined with AI-calibrated quizzes that adjust difficulty in real time.

keyCapabilities.title: Two-layer crisis detection
keyCapabilities.description: When a student signals distress, KIRAN helpline surfaces on-screen in under two seconds — before any human has read a word. Counsellors and administrators are alerted in parallel.

keyCapabilities.title: Voice-first, low-bandwidth
keyCapabilities.description: Works on entry-level Android phones without a dedicated app. Ten-plus regional languages supported out of the box.

outcomes: Every student gets a mentor, not just the ones who can afford one
Teachers see class-wide comprehension in real time, not at term-end
Principals spot at-risk students weeks earlier
